description: Retrieves the buffered rule execution entries for an active G4 session.

sessionId.description: The unique identifier of the active G4 session whose buffered rules should be retrieved.

name: g4.GetBuffer

buffer.description: An ordered list of rule execution entries recorded for the session.

rule.description: The G4 rule model that was buffered, including its type, parameters, and configuration.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds) indicating when the rule entry was recorded.

title: Get G4 Rules Buffer
